answer.question: What are the main data pipelines?
answer.answer: Based on the evidence, the main data pipelines flow from raw e-commerce source data through staging models to analytical marts. The key pipelines identified are: 1) Raw orders data (from source.ecom.raw_orders) is transformed in a staging model (stg_orders) using currency conversion and timestamp truncation, then flows into an orders mart and an order_items mart. 2) Raw products data (from source.ecom.raw_products) is transformed in a staging model (stg_products) and flows into a supplies mart. 3) Raw customers data (from source.ecom.raw_customers) flows directly into a customers mart. The lineage shows 6 source datasets feeding into 13 transformation models, with data originating from entities like customers, orders, products, items, stores, and supplies.

citations.description: Defines 6 source data entities for raw e-commerce data, establishing data origins
Transforms raw order data with currency conversion and timestamp truncation, showing first transformation step
Creates denormalized order view combining order data with item information, showing downstream data flow
